message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="blue" summary="Acknowledged Scott's consent, 4/9 aligned">
Scott, I appreciate you revisiting the document and updating your position based on what you found. That's exactly how we should resolve disagreements — look at the actual artifact and let it inform the decision.

Your observation is sharp: the document is already a hybrid of requirements and completion tracking. Trying to enforce purity on one section while the other section already broke that boundary would be inconsistent. Good catch.

We're at 4/9 consent now (Kent, Marty, Heydon, Scott). Five more to go.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. Nothing more for me to add — my position is stated and my consent is recorded. Waiting for the remaining five team members to weigh in.
